name: vscode-crash-recovery-skills
description: Manual, safety-first workflows for diagnosing VS Code memory pressure and cleaning idle project-scoped Gradle daemons on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Safely diagnose VS Code memory pressure
interface.longDescription: Audit one VS Code workspace at a time, protect active sessions and tracked assets, and optionally clean only revalidated idle Gradle daemons scoped to one project.
defaultPrompt: Audit this VS Code workspace for crash and memory-pressure causes without touching other windows.
Dry-run project-scoped cleanup for idle Gradle daemons in this repository.
